basicDetails.implementingAgency: Registered Office, APB&OCWWB Of Respective District Of Arunachal Pradesh

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Old Age Pension Scheme” was started by the Department of Labour and Employment, Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh for registered workers of Arunachal Pradesh Building &amp; Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (APB&amp;OCWWB). The government of Arunachal Pradesh has introduced the pension scheme through the board and the aim of the scheme is to secure the economic dependency of a worker after retirement or at an old age period.
schemeContent.benefits_md: 1. Cash assistance of ₹500/- per month, to the old age beneficiaries with an increase in ₹10/- on completion of every 5 years.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme “Old Age Pension Scheme” was started by the Department of Labour and Employment, Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh for the registered workers of Arunachal Pradesh Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (APB&OCWWB).

children.text: The scheme “Old Age Pension Scheme” was started by the Department of Labour and Employment, Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh for registered workers of Arunachal Pradesh Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (APB&OCWWB). The government of Arunachal Pradesh has introduced the pension scheme through the board and the aim of the scheme is to secure the economic dependency of a worker after retirement or at an old age period.
1. Cash assistance of ₹500/- per month, to the old age beneficiaries with an increase in ₹10/- on completion of every 5 years.
For taking benefit of this scheme, the applicant needs to contact Registering Officers, APB&OCWWB of the respective District.
Application in the prescribed format may be received from the concerned office.
The applicant needs to fill the application form completely and attach all the relevant documents. Thereafter, the applicant may submit the application form to the concerned office.
After successful verification, the applicant can avail the benefit of the scheme.

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Step 01:** For taking benefit of this scheme, the applicant needs to contact Registering Officers, APB&amp;OCWWB of the respective District.
**Step 02:** Application in the prescribed format may be received from the concerned office.
**Step 03:** The applicant needs to fill the application form completely and attach all the relevant documents. Thereafter, the applicant may submit the application form to the concerned office.
**Step 04:** After successful verification, the applicant can avail the benefit of the scheme.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1.	The applicant should be a permanent resident of Arunachal Pradesh.
2.	The applicant must be employed in the Building and Other Construction works.
3.	The applicant should be registered with Labour Welfare Board (APB&OCWWB).
4.	The applicant with a membership for at least 1 year after the age of 60 years is eligible to apply under the scheme.

3.	The applicant should be registered with Labour Welfare Board (APB&OCWWB).
4.	The applicant with a membership for at least 1 year after the age of 60 years is eligible to apply under the scheme.
